results.name: thunder blaster
results.description: Thunder-powered firearms with a distinctive two-pronged design, including thunder rifles and thunder pistols.

results.name: thunder bow
results.description: Heavy crossbows powered by the unique magic of Thunder Junction.

results.name: thunder tech
results.description: Weapons and other items powered by "thunder," a type of magic found on Thunder Junction

results.name: tibalt (phyrexian)
results.description: Tibalt, compleated.

results.name: tilted towers
results.description: I love to get tilted at the ᴛᴏᴡᴇʀs

results.name: tilt-shift perspective
results.description: A form of perspective mostly commonly associated with photographing small objects such as miniatures, or making things appear as such

results.name: time lord
results.description: A long-lived alien species from the planet Gallifrey with the ability to cheat death through regeneration.

results.name: time spiral dominaria
results.description: The wastelands of Dominaria as depicted throughout the Time Spiral block.

results.name: timing restriction
results.description: Spells with unusual restrictions on when they can be cast.

results.name: tin street
results.description: A street on Ravnica.

results.name: tiro
results.description: A soldier of Theros, and lover of Kynaios of Meletis.

results.name: titan engine
results.description: Did you know Urza once invented a set of nine mechas armed with rocket launchers and laser cannons? This is a thing that happened.

results.name: titan immortality
results.description: These cards are shuffled into your library as they hit the graveyard.

results.name: titan's grave
results.description: Location on Arcavios built in the skeleton of a long dead beast. Strongly associated with Witherbloom College.

results.name: titan trigger
results.description: An ability that triggers on both entering the battlefield and attacking, similar to the Titan cycle from M11

results.name: tivit
results.description: A sphinx from New Capenna.

results.name: toad
results.description: Toads are a non-scientific group mostly denoting frogs with warts and rough leathery skin. 🐸

results.name: token doubler
results.description: If you would make X tokens, twice are made instead.

results.name: token errata
results.description: These cards used to make a different type of token, which has since been updated. For type lines, see [Type Errata](type-errata)

results.name: token increaser
results.description: Cards that increase the amount of tokens you make, either by increasing the amount of tokens that are to be made or adding additional tokens

results.name: tokenlink
results.description: Dealing N damage creates N tokens (or similar).

results.name: token replacer
results.description: Cards that completely replace the tokens that will be created with other tokens.

results.name: token version of a card
results.description: These tokens are identical to a card except for missing CMC. See the parent tag above for more information.

results.name: token versions of cards
results.description: Some cards create tokens identical to existing cards (except for CMC). See: [cards creating these tokens](/tags/card/creates-token-of-a-card),  [printed tokens](/tags/card/token-version-of-a-card), and [the cards recreated in token form](/tags/card/has-identical-token).

results.name: token without a card
results.description: No cards make these tokens, probably due to errata.
